response.justification: While Bogdan has strong senior-level software engineering experience and demonstrates good architectural and mentoring practices, he severely lacks the minimum required 8 years of C++ experience, showing less than a year professionally. Furthermore, his background is primarily in full-stack web development and microservices rather than foundational cloud compute platform infrastructure, making him a poor fit for this specific C++ heavy technical lead role.
strengths: Proven technical leadership and mentoring experience through Staff-level roles, organizing dojos, and conducting technical workshops.
Strong background in software design, architecture, and engineering best practices, including TDD, CI/CD, and trunk-based development.
Experience with high-throughput distributed systems, such as handling millions of HTTP requests per second using DLang.
concerns: Critical lack of C++ experience, possessing less than one year of professional experience compared to the 8 years required.
Background is heavily skewed towards full-stack web and application development rather than core cloud compute, storage, or hardware architecture.
Lacks explicit experience leading a dedicated cloud infrastructure or platform engineering team.
